zh.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville是Sir Lord Richard de Boneville的兒子，於1080年出生。他至少有2個兒子。他去世於1143年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville是Sir Lord Richard de Boneville的儿子，于1080年出生。他至少有2个儿子。他去世于1143年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boneville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

variants.name: Bonville
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville was born in 1080 as the son of Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. He had at least 2 sons. He died in 1143, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville est né en 1080, fils de Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1143, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville wurde 1080, als Sohn von Sir Lord Richard de Boneville geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1143 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville è nato il nel 1080 come figlio di Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1143, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Bonevilleは1080年にSir Lord Richard de Bonevilleの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1143年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville(은)는 1080년 Sir Lord Richard de Boneville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1143년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville nasceu em 1080 filho de Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1143, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville родился в 1080 г. Его отца звали Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1143 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Boneville nació en 1080 como hijo de Sir Lord Richard de Boneville. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1143, a la edad de 63 años.

th.1130–Male: ปี1130–ถึงแก่กรรม
